title: Notifications via automations to email
excerpt: There is something wrong when you configure a notification, monday.com ignores the spaces, enters, or tabulation between the titles and fields you want to notify, in result you receive an email without spaces between eve…

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is something wrong when you configure a notification, monday.com ignores the spaces, enters, or tabulation between the titles and fields you want to notify, in result you receive an email without spaces between every field which is very messy …

HOW IT SHOULD BE

image987×441 28.1 KB

HOW RESULTS

image754×308 6.47 KB

posts.author: Cristina (Cristina)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve tried adding “
” as line break. This works for the notifications you view on Monday.com itself on the browser. However, it shows “
” in the email text.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, i´ve tried something like “/” but anyway it doesnt look good.

posts.author: IchbinAlf (Florian Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml: Were there any improvements on this topic?

posts.author: melissav-monday.com (Melissa - monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @hlopezvc, @Cristina, & @IchbinAlf, - Melissa here from Support! At this time, the email notifications do not support custom formatting. This is something that has been brought to the attention of our product team, so stay tuned for continued improvements to the platform!

posts.author: jkrantz (Jason Krantz)
posts.cookedHtml: Any word on getting this fixed up? The email notifications sure look messy.

posts.author: rbenhase (Ryan Benhase)
posts.cookedHtml:
@melissav-monday.com

This would be a huge improvement to our experience with email notifications (which currently aren’t very useful because including any level of detail inside the notification message causes those details to get lost in the clutter).

It looks like folks have been asking for this for quite a while, and it doesn’t seem like it would be particularly difficult or time consuming from a development perspective. Just wondering if this is anywhere on the roadmap.

posts.author: jorge.apud (Jorge Apud)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I had the same problem, but I found a simple way to fix it, just replace any card return for "<“br>” (just de braces and the br) that is the equivalent of a CR in html. It works just fine.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
